alt: The Everyday Produce stand at 7300 Wornall - green-striped tent, signage, flowers in front
Konrad ringing up customers at the stand
Hanging baskets of pink, orange, and yellow flowers at the stand
Wide rack of geraniums and bedding plants outside the stand
Carts loaded with begonias and other potted flowers

Petunias and gazanias in front of the 7300 Wornall storefront
Pints of fresh red strawberries in green cartons
Trays of zucchini, yellow squash, and peppers
Watermelons, cantaloupes, and signage at the stand entrance
